About me

Hi, I'm Ishrat Jahan

Digital Marketing Expert

A results-driven Digital Marketing Expert passionate about helping businesses grow through strategic digital solutions.

Areas of expertise

SEO Local SEO Article Writing Social Media Marketing Paid Advertising Lead Generation Marketing Strategy Market Research UGC Ads Creation AI-Powered Marketing Solutions

I specialize in building data-driven marketing strategies that improve online visibility, attract qualified leads, and increase business growth. By combining creativity with analytics and the latest AI technologies, I create effective campaigns that deliver measurable results.

I believe every business is unique, so I focus on understanding each brand's goals before developing customized marketing strategies. My approach is centered on innovation, continuous learning, and delivering high-quality work that creates real impact.

Whether you're looking to improve your search rankings, generate more leads, grow your social media presence, launch high-converting UGC ads, or leverage AI to scale your marketing, I'm committed to helping your business achieve sustainable success.

"Turning ideas into growth with smart digital marketing."

SEO Audit Case Studies

Client Reports

Full-site SEO audits — technical health, on-page issues, backlink profile, and strategic recommendations — delivered as client-ready reports.

🗞️

Bangla Edition — Business & SEO Overview

Media & Journalism
CAudit Grade
43%On-Page Score
21Recommendations
72 / 68DA / PA
27%Off-Page Score

✅ Strengths (USPs)

  • Digital-only platform enabling rapid content distribution
  • Low-cost media operation with scalable infrastructure
  • Fast publishing capability for breaking news & updates
  • SEO-friendly content structure optimized for search visibility
  • Focus on Bangla-language content for a national audience

⚠️ Weaknesses & Challenges

  • Lack of strong offline presence impacting brand trust
  • Limited authority in the media industry vs. established competitors
  • High competition in the digital news space
  • Traffic volatility risk due to reliance on online channels

🔧 Key Technical & On-Page Findings

  • Page title (772px) and meta description (1,765px) both run far over recommended length
  • 109 duplicate headings detected — disproportionate to page content
  • 8 images missing alt attributes, affecting SEO and accessibility
  • Meta refresh tag used for redirects instead of proper 301s; www / non-www duplication
  • Page response time of 0.46s, just above the recommended 0.4s
  • Only 13 backlinks from 6 referring domains — 0% rated as quality backlinks

💡 Business Impact

  • Search engines struggle to index content due to loading & markup issues
  • Poor readability and over-optimized metadata reduce user trust
  • Monetization potential and brand authority remain constrained until fixed

🔗 Organic Traffic & Backlink Profile

995Organic Traffic
$9Traffic Value
208Total Backlinks
74Referring Domains
58 / 150Dofollow / Nofollow
41 / 41IPs / Subnets
  • Organic traffic climbed from ~350 to a peak of 1.4K monthly visits before settling near 1.1K
  • Highest-authority backlinks come from Wikipedia/Wikitia coverage (Domain Strength 72–78) and an interim-government policy article (CPD.org.bd)
  • banglaedition.com and www.banglaedition.com anchor texts account for the largest share of referring links (71 & 28 backlinks)
  • Only 2 edu and 0 gov backlinks — an opportunity area for future authority-building

⚡ Site Performance & Core Web Vitals

54Mobile Perf. Score
47Desktop Perf. Score
0.9–3.6sFirst Contentful Paint
3.4–15.8sLargest Contentful Paint
  • Largest Contentful Paint ranges from 3.4s (mobile) to a slow 15.8s on the heavier page view — a top priority fix
  • Total Blocking Time of 540–620ms indicates render-blocking scripts slowing interactivity
  • Cumulative Layout Shift stays low (0.028–0.05), so visual stability is not a major concern

🔝 Top Backlink Sources

Wikitia — "Elias Hossain (journalist)"DS 78
Wiki2 — "2013 Shahbag protests"DS 77
WikiZero — "2013 Shahbag protests"DS 73
CPD.org.bd — Interim Govt articleDS 72
Top Articles DirectoryDS 70
Zoombangla — Instagram alternativeDS 64

📄 Top Pages by Backlinks

/country/2025/07/19/24427884
banglaedition.com/ (https)55
banglaedition.com/ (http, www)27
banglaedition.com/ (https, www)11
/education/2025/03/12/2365854
/opinion/2024/11/02/2315973

🔗 Top Anchor Texts

banglaedition.com71
WWW.BANGLAEDITION.COM28
Full country/2025 URL28
Bangla news headline anchor (Bangla)28
Bangla Edition11
banglaedition / Banglaedition7 / 5
🏬

Retromass — SEO Audit

E-commerce

🔧 Key Findings

  • Unattractive theme reducing visual appeal and trust
  • Header navigation poorly structured — key pages like "About Us" pushed to the bottom
  • Slow-loading video hurting page performance
  • Footer lacking spacing and color, weakening brand presentation
  • Navigation bar positioning inconsistent (left/right)
  • Missing dedicated opening for the "Contact Us" page

📌 Google Business

Verified location listing referenced in the audit.
